code: import{create}from'zustand';import{getLeaderboard,getAttempts,submitToLeaderboard,getPersonalBest}from'../db/database';const useLeaderboardStore=create(set=>({leaderboard:[],history:[],loading:false,fetchLeaderboard:async()=>{set({loading:true});const leaderboard=await getLeaderboard();set({leaderboard,loading:false});},fetchHistory:async username=>{if(!username){set({history:[]});return;}const history=await getAttempts(username);set({history});},submitScore:async(username,score)=>{const isNew=await submitToLeaderboard(username,score);if(isNew){const leaderboard=await getLeaderboard();set({leaderboard});}return isNew;},fetchPersonalBest:async username=>{return getPersonalBest(username);}}));export default useLeaderboardStore;
